title: Announcements

Announcements

Okan Homepage

Announcements

04
						December

2025

Dear Students,

The results of the Erasmus+ Written Exam held on December 2, 2025, are announced below.

The Erasmus+ language exam average will be calculated by including the scores of candidates who scored at least 60 on the speaking exam, and the winners will be determined based on their averages. (The calculation will be based on the following weighting: Overall Grade Average: 50%, Language Exam Result: 50%.)

NOTE:

The appeal process for the Erasmus+ Foreign Language Exam results will begin after the final scores are announced.

The announcement of the final Erasmus+ scores will be made in our next announcement.

NOTE:

Candidates who scored at least 70 points in the Erasmus+ Written Exam are eligible to take the Speaking Exam.

Click here for Erasmus+ Written Exam results.
